zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur於1052年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯也斯時，她的父親Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy48歲，母親Albreda Preaux45歲。她於1074年與Peter Piers De Valognes在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1112年之後在英國英格蘭賀特福爾貝寧頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可賓納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur于1052年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯也斯时，她的父亲Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy48岁，母亲Albreda Preaux45岁。她于1074年与Peter Piers De Valognes在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1112年之后在英国英格兰賀特福爾貝寧頓，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可賓納姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from an ancient Germanic personal name, but mainly a nickname for an exceptionally tall or big man, Middle High German rise, German Riese ‘giant’. In some cases the name may have been used to refer ironically to a particularly short man.
South German: habitational name from any of several places called Ries.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German rīs ‘branch, twig, brushwood’.

variants.name: Reas
meanings: Altered form of German   Ries  ,   Riess  .

variants.name: Riese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz, Horst, Willi.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ries   1.

variants.name: Riess
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Mathias, Kurt, Dietmar, Frieda, Fritz, Gerd, Gottfried, Guenther, Hans, Konrad, Otto, Reinhard.
German: habitational name from an area of Bavaria so named.

variants.name: Ris
meanings: Swiss German: Alemannic variant of   Ries   3 or   Reis   1.
Swiss German: topographic name from Middle High German risi ‘water channel (made of stone or wood) on a mountain’ for someone who lived near such a structure.

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur was born in 1052, in Ryes, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, was 48 and her mother, Albreda Preaux, was 45. She married Peter Piers De Valognes in 1074, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1112, in Benington, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Binham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur est née en 1052, à Ryes, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Albreda Preaux, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Piers De Valognes en 1074, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1112, à Benington, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Binham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur 1052 in Ryes, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy 48 und ihre Mutter Albreda Preaux 45. Sie hat 1074 in Suffolk, England Peter Piers De Valognes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1112 in Benington, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Binham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur è nata il nel 1052 nel Ryes, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Albreda Preaux, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Peter Piers De Valognes nel 1074, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1112, nel Benington, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Binham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveurが1052年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスリスで生まれた時，父Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandyは48歳，母Albreda Preauxは45歳であった。1074年にイギリススフォルクでPeter Piers De Valognesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1112年以後にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアベニントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクビンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur(이)가 1052년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda Preaux(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1074년 영국 수폴크에서 Peter Piers De Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1112년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 베닝턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 빈함에 묻혔다.

mn.Binham, North Norfolk District, Norfolk,: Binham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur nasceu em 1052, em Ryes, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Preaux, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter Piers De Valognes em 1074, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1112, em Benington, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Binham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur родилась в 1052 г. в местности риесь, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Preaux, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Piers De Valognes в 1074 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1112 г. в местности бенингтон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бинам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur nació en 1052, en Ryes, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Albreda Preaux, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Peter Piers De Valognes en 1074, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1112, en Benington, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Binham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
